title: Even High Court building not safe then: Karnataka HC on private party's claim over Police Quarters land
description: The Karnataka High Court on Thursday took exception to a claim made by an individual that the land housing police quarters in Bengaluru belongs to him [Srinath Nagaragadde vs State of Karnataka].Justice M Nagaprasanna observed that if such claims were true, even the High Court building itself would not be safe.The Court questioned the petitioner's contention that the police occupation of the property was unauthorised.“That’s why I was telling, if this is permitted, this (High Court) building is
